---
title: "Helen Shipton"
---

## Helen Shipton

**Dates:** (b. 1857)

### Description

novelist, contributor to <i>MP</i> (1886-96)

### Biography

She collaborated with CRC and CMY; she was born at Barlow, Derbyshire, the daughter of the Rev. George Shipton, vicar of Brampton, Derbyshire. [census; Blain, <i>Feminist Companion</i>]

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 29 [1899]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
